name: feature-dev-isolated
description: Same shape as feature-dev, but every task runs in its own git worktree on its own branch (autosk/<task-id>).

next_steps.prompt_rule: When all requirements of the task are met, the implementation builds and tests locally, AND the agent has committed its work on this task's branch (`autosk/<task-id>`). Uncommitted edits are discarded when the worktree is reaped on terminal status.
When the review uncovered no blocking issues and coverage looks healthy.
When the review surfaced bugs, missing tests, or style issues that need to go back to dev.
When the implementation does not satisfy the task description strictly.
When the task is implemented, verified, and the human should accept it (and merge `autosk/<task-id>` into the base branch).
